name: Cheat Codes
description: '''Cheat Codes''' is an American DJ trio from [[Los Angeles, California]]. The group consisting of KEVI (Kevin Ford / Prince$$ Rosie), Trevor Dahl, and Matthew Russell. The group is notable for their 2016 single "[[Sex (Cheat Codes and Kris Kross Amsterdam song)|Sex]]", which samples the chorus from "[[Let's Talk About Sex]]" by [[Salt-N-Pepa]], and their 2017 single "[[No Promises (Cheat Codes song)|No Promises]]", which featured American singer [[Demi Lovato]] and peaked within the Top 40 of the US, UK and Australia. The track was [[Certified platinum|certified Platinum]] by the [[RIAA]].
